title: podman-remote: images --format .History : unexpected cruft
body:
In window 1:
```console
$ ./bin/podman system service --timeout=0
```
In window 2:
```console
$ ./bin/podman-remote images alpine --format '{{ .History }}'
a24bb4013296f61e89ba57005a7b3e52274d8edd3ae2077d04395f806b63d83e, <missing>
4fab981df737963d83b548a3a6f4e7b43f718eb88567ba5ec7921f636a93d7bc, <missing>, <missing>, <missing>, <missing>, <missing>, <missing>, <missing>, <missing>
```
Compare to plain podman:
```console
$ ./bin/podman images alpine --format '{{ .History }}'
             <--- these are two empty lines

```
